title: QA QC assistant
description:
Job Responsibilities​

  1. Assist QA (Quality Assurance) and QC (Quality Control) teams in preparing and organizing documentary records for standardized welding processes, ensuring the accuracy and completeness of technical documentation.​
  2. Organize and manage personnel documents related to construction site staff, including sorting, filing, and updating personal information materials.​
  3. Be responsible for the registration and management of passports for relevant personnel, tracking the validity period of passports and reminding relevant personnel to renew them in a timely manner.​
  4. Assist in external coordination and communication work to ensure the smooth progress of engineering projects, such as coordinating with external cooperative units, government departments, or other relevant parties on matters related to the project.​
  5. Complete other administrative and supportive tasks assigned by the superior.

Job Requirements​

  1. Fluent in both Chinese and English, with excellent oral and written communication skills, able to handle daily work communication in both languages.​
  2. Proficient in operating various computer document software, including but not limited to Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and able to efficiently complete document editing, data sorting, and form making.​
  3. Meticulous and careful in work, with a strong sense of responsibility, able to accurately handle detailed work such as document sorting and data registration, and avoid errors.​
  4. Hard - working and able to bear work pressure, willing to actively take on work tasks and adapt to the working rhythm of Monday to Saturday.​
  5. Strong comprehension ability, able to quickly understand work requirements and project-related information, and efficiently complete assigned work.​
  6. Having relevant working experience in engineering, construction, or administrative support is preferred (not a mandatory requirement).

postedCompany.description:
Suntec Construction Engineering Pte. Ltd. originated from Jianxin Engineering Installation Co., Ltd. in Suzhou, China. As a professional mechanical and electrical installation contractor, we specialize in the production and installation of large-scale air conditioning, HVAC, fire protection, process, and various special gas pipelines in clean rooms. Our services also cover multiple fields, including construction, manufacturing, energy, and transportation.

  We have a highly qualified and experienced professional team. Our technical personnel have many years of experience in mechanical and electrical engineering and can provide customers with comprehensive and high-quality technical support and services.

  We have always been committed to providing customers with the best quality services, adhering to the service concept of "customer first, quality first", strictly following national standards and customer requirements, and ensuring that each project can be completed on time, with quality, and quantity.

In the future, we will continue to adhere to the development concept of "people-oriented, technological innovation", continuously improve our service level and quality, continuously explore and innovate, and provide customers with more high-quality, efficient, and comprehensive mechanical and electrical equipment installation and technical services.
postedCompany.name: SUNTEC CONSTRUCTION ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
